llm_verdict.message:
The audit log file permissions have been corrected:

- Verified the log file path from **/etc/audit/auditd.conf** (default `/var/log/audit/audit.log`).
- Checked current permissions (showed `777`).
- Applied secure permissions with `chmod 0600`.

The system now complies with the **file_permissions_var_log_audit** requirement (mode 0640 or more restrictive).
